courses.title: Airworthiness Course (AWC)
outline: Ageing Aircraft and Ageing Aircraft Systems
Reporting Of Failures, Malfunctions and Defects
Interface Between Flight Operations and Airworthiness (Maintenance)
The Future Of Airworthiness – Performance Based Approach
courses.course_description: This comprehensive course covers the essentials of airworthiness for aircraft operators, providing participants with a deep understanding of regulatory frameworks, certification processes, continuing airworthiness management, and the integration of safety and quality systems. It addresses key challenges including ageing aircraft, human factors, and future performance-based approaches to ensure compliance and operational safety.

courses.title: Quality Management Systems for Airlines (QMS)
outline: Overview of ISO 9000 Quality Management Systems
Quality Culture, Quality Costs & Quality Evaluation
courses.course_description: This course equips aviation professionals with the knowledge and skills to implement and maintain effective Quality Management Systems tailored for airlines. It covers ISO standards, regulatory requirements, risk-based thinking, performance monitoring, and the integration of QMS with Safety Management Systems for enhanced operational excellence.

courses.title: Aircraft Maintenance Management (AMM)
courses.course_description: A detailed program focusing on best practices in aircraft maintenance management, including planning, resource optimization, cost control, quality assurance, and human factors to ensure efficient, safe, and compliant maintenance operations.

courses.title: Aircraft Maintenance Planning and Control (AMPC)
outline: Role of Maintenance Planning in Aircraft Operations
Human Factors, Error and Risk Management in Aircraft Maintenance
Cost Saving Strategies through Cost Effective Maintenance Planning
courses.course_description: This course provides in-depth knowledge of maintenance planning, scheduling, forecasting, and control techniques essential for optimizing aircraft availability while managing costs and ensuring regulatory compliance and safety.

courses.title: Aviation Stores Management (ASM)
outline: Role of Stores in Aircraft Operations
Determining Traceability and Eligibility of Aircraft Replacement Parts
Overview of Quality Systems Procedures/ Stores Quality Audit
Overview of SMS and Human Factors
Managing Errors abounding in Stores Management
Role of Human Factors in Technical Stores System
Effect of Human Factors on Stores Management Performance
Impact of Epidemic Outbreak on Stores Management and Mitigation
courses.course_description: Focused on effective management of aviation technical stores, this course covers regulatory compliance, supply chain, parts authenticity, quality audits, and human factors to prevent errors and ensure reliable spares support for aircraft operations.

courses.title: Airline Management (AM)
outline: Effects of Economic Regulations on Safety
courses.course_description: This course offers a broad perspective on airline management, encompassing economics, operations, marketing, fleet planning, safety, and regulatory compliance to develop strategic leadership skills for airline executives.

courses.title: Airline Technical Records & Document Control System (ATRDC)
outline: Role of Technical Records and Document Control in Aircraft Operations
Function and Organization of Technical Records
Overview of Safety Management Systems & Human Factors
courses.course_description: This specialized course addresses the critical role of technical records and document control in maintaining airworthiness, covering regulatory requirements, electronic management systems, and best practices for accuracy and compliance.

courses.title: Human Factors In Aircraft Maintenance (MHF)
outline: The Origins of Human Factors Regulations
Threat and Error Management in Aircraft Maintenance
Elements of an Effective Human Factors Programme
courses.course_description: Designed to enhance safety in maintenance environments, this course explores human performance, error management, organizational culture, and practical strategies to mitigate risks associated with human factors in aircraft maintenance.

courses.title: Aviation Library Management (ALM)
outline: ICAO as Source of Aviation Publications
Introduction to Nigeria Civil Aviation Regulations (Nig.CARs)
Organisation and Development of Airline Libraries
courses.course_description: This course provides comprehensive training on managing aviation technical libraries, including acquisition, organization, digital transformation, regulatory compliance, and the role of libraries in supporting safety and oversight functions.

courses.title: Safety Management Systems (SMS)
outline: Safety Risk Management: Hazard Identification and Analysis
Safety Performance Monitoring and Continuous improvement
SMS Leadership and Culture: Building a Safety – Centric Organisation
courses.course_description: This essential course delivers practical knowledge for implementing and maintaining ICAO-compliant Safety Management Systems, focusing on risk management, safety promotion, performance monitoring, and building a strong safety culture.

courses.title: Quality Auditing Techniques (QAT)
outline: Safety and the Link to Regulation
Overview of ISO 9000 Quality System Standards
How to Plan, Conduct and Report Audits
IOSA, E-IOSA and Quality Audit Requirements
courses.course_description: Participants learn professional auditing skills for quality management systems in aviation, including planning, execution, reporting, and compliance with IOSA and regulatory standards.

courses.title: Aircraft Maintenance Programmes (AMP)
outline: Maintenance Programme Evolution and Maintenance Tasks Development
MSG-3 Approach and Application of MSG-3 Analysis Techniques
Maintenance Programme Continuing Analysis and Surveillance System
Human Performance Limitations and Error Management
New Developments in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering
courses.course_description: This advanced course explores the development, optimization, and management of aircraft maintenance programmes using reliability-centered maintenance and MSG-3 methodologies.

courses.title: Introduction to Aviation Management (AVM)
outline: Overview of the Air Transportation System and Environment
Air Transport Manager as Teamwork Architect
Role and Functions of Civil Aviation Authority
Impact of Technology on Air Transportation
The Future of Air Transportation Management
Effect of Economic Regulation on Safety
courses.course_description: An introductory course providing foundational knowledge of the aviation industry, its key stakeholders, management principles, and emerging trends for new or aspiring aviation managers.

courses.title: Material and Logistics Management (MLM)
outline: Role of Materials & Logistics in Aircraft Operations
Understanding the Relevance of Maintenance Documents
Cost Saving Strategy Through Cost Effective Material Planning
Risk Management in Material & Logistics Planning
courses.course_description: This course focuses on strategic material and logistics management in aviation, emphasizing supply chain efficiency, cost control, quality assurance, and risk management.

courses.title: Train - The - Trainers (TTT)
outline: Training Functions and Management Consulting Roles – An Overview
The Learning Process and Elements of Effective Teaching
Training Methods: Lecture, Case Study & Role Play
Developing and Writing Case Studies and Role Play
The Trainer’s Communication Skills: Presentation Techniques
Training Program Design, Development and Administration
Formulating Training Policy, Cost/Benefit Analysis of Training
Evaluation of Training Programs & Training Proposal Writing
Application of Emotional Intelligence in Training
courses.course_description: A practical train-the-trainer program designed to develop effective instructional skills, curriculum design, evaluation techniques, and adult learning principles for aviation trainers.

courses.title: Flight Operations Management (FOM)
outline: ICAO Universal Safety oversight Audit Programmes (USOAP)
Maintenance and Flight Operations Interface Control
courses.course_description: This course covers key aspects of managing flight operations, including regulatory compliance, safety oversight, quality assurance, and interface with maintenance functions.

courses.title: Flight Operations Quality Assurance (FOQA)
outline: Objectives of an Operators FOQA Programme
Description of a Typical FOQA Programme
FOQA Programme within a Safety Management System
Planning and Introduction of FOQA Programme
Organisation and Control of FOQA Information
Interpretation and Use of FOQA Information
Regulations and Requirements Related to FOQA
courses.course_description: Focused on Flight Data Analysis, this course teaches how to implement and utilize FOQA programs to enhance safety and operational performance within an SMS framework.

courses.title: Human Factors In Operations (HFO)
outline: Hazards in the Workplace and Managing Workplace Risks from COVID-19
Human Factors and Epidemic Outbreak Control
courses.course_description: This course examines human factors in flight and ground operations, providing tools for error management, situational awareness, and building high-reliability operational teams.

courses.title: Principles and Methods of Accident Prevention (AP)
courses.course_description: Participants gain practical knowledge of proactive accident prevention strategies, risk management, data analysis, and the establishment of effective safety programs.

courses.title: Crew Resource Management (CRM)
courses.course_description: This CRM course develops non-technical skills such as communication, leadership, decision-making, and error management for flight crews and operations personnel.

courses.title: Dispatch Resource Management (DRM)
courses.course_description: Tailored for flight dispatchers, this course enhances resource management, teamwork, decision-making, and stress management skills in the dispatch environment.

courses.title: Management Of Air Navigation Systems And Safety (MANS)
outline: Latest Trends in Regulations, Government Directives and Policy Challenges
Human Performance Factors in Air Navigation Systems
courses.course_description: This course addresses the management, safety, and technological aspects of air navigation services in the evolving aviation landscape.

courses.title: Basic Meteorology (Aeromet) (BMA)
outline: Thunderstorms and Ice Accretion on Aircraft
courses.course_description: An introductory course on meteorology relevant to aviation operations, covering weather phenomena, forecasting, and its impact on flight safety.

courses.title: Fuel Tank Safety (FTS)
outline: Global Review of In-Service Fuel Tank Safety Data
Regulatory Background for Fuel Tank Safety
Fuel Tank System Airworthiness Limitation Items (ALI)
Organisation Responsibilities: Personnel Training, Maintenance Programme Update
Considerations related to Human Factors in Aircraft Fuel Tank Systems
Aviation Fuel Tank Preparation Procedures for Maintenance Entry
Human Factors when working in Aircraft Fuel Tanks
Recording Maintenance action for Fuel Tank Safety
courses.course_description: Critical training on fuel tank safety issues, CDCCL, flammability reduction, and maintenance procedures to prevent fuel tank-related hazards.

courses.title: Nominated/Designated Postholders Training (NPH)
outline: Environmental Analysis of the Aviation System
courses.course_description: Targeted at key postholders and nominated personnel, this course covers regulatory responsibilities, safety management, and leadership in airline operations.

courses.title: Chief Pilots Course (CPC)
outline: Crew Member and FOO Qualifications: Commercial Air Transport
courses.course_description: Designed for Chief Pilots, this course addresses operational management, regulatory compliance, safety programs, and crew oversight responsibilities.

courses.title: Accountable Managers Course (AMC)
outline: Safety Management and Quality Assurance Techniques
Effect of Economic Regulation on Safety
courses.course_description: This short course prepares Accountable Managers with the knowledge required for high-level oversight, regulatory compliance, and safety accountability in aviation organizations.

courses.title: Engineering Managers Course (EMC)
outline: Key Issues Related to Maintenance Errors
Overview of Contributing Factors to Human Error
courses.course_description: Focused on leadership in engineering and maintenance, this course emphasizes human factors management, error reduction, and regulatory compliance for engineering managers.

courses.title: Regulations For Engineers: Interpreting And Understanding Nig.CARs (RFE)
outline: Part 8 (Section 8.3) - Aircraft Maintenance and Inspection Requirements
PART 9 - Air Operator Certification and Administration
courses.course_description: In-depth training on Nigerian Civil Aviation Regulations (Nig.CARs) specifically tailored for engineers, covering key parts relevant to airworthiness and maintenance.

courses.title: Regulations For Pilots: Interpreting And Understanding Nig.CARs (RFP)
outline: PART 9 - Air Operator Certification and Administration
courses.course_description: Comprehensive review of Nig.CARs for pilots, focusing on licensing, operations, airworthiness, security, and safety management requirements.

courses.title: Aviation Induction (AIC)
outline: Overview of Air Transportation System and Environment
Evolution of Civil Aviation in Nigeria
Role & Functions of Nigerian Civil Aviation Authority
Effect of Economic Regulation on Safety
courses.course_description: An entry-level induction course providing a broad overview of the aviation industry, regulations, key functions, and foundational concepts for new aviation personnel.

courses.title: Finance for Non-Finance Managers
outline: The “Business Cycle” for Private and Public Sectors Organisations
Terms and Concepts used in Finance Profile and loss
Cost Accounting for Services and Products
Value of a Service/Product Unique selling points
courses.course_description: This course demystifies financial concepts for non-finance aviation managers, covering budgeting, financial statements, ratios, and decision-making tools.

courses.title: Flight Dispatcher/Flight Operations Officer (Basic) (FDB)
courses.course_description: Foundational training preparing participants for a career as Flight Dispatchers/Flight Operations Officers, covering core technical and operational subjects.

courses.title: Flight Dispatcher/Flight Operations Officer (Advanced) (FDA)
courses.course_description: Advanced training building on basic knowledge with practical dispatch skills, DRM, and on-the-job preparation for licensed Flight Dispatchers.

courses.title: Cabin Crew (Initial) Training (CCI)
outline: Customer Services and Managing Passenger Interractions
courses.course_description: Comprehensive initial training for aspiring cabin crew members, covering safety, emergency procedures, customer service, and aircraft-specific knowledge.

courses.title: Cabin Crew Conversion/Refresher Training (CCC/CCR) (B737 Classic)
courses.course_description: Type-specific conversion or refresher training for cabin crew on B737 Classic aircraft, including emergency procedures and hands-on drills.

courses.title: Cabin Crew Conversion/Refresher Training (CCC/CCR) (HS125-800)
courses.course_description: Type-specific conversion or refresher training for cabin crew on HS125-800 aircraft.

courses.title: Safety/Emergency /Survival Equipment Procedures Training (SESP)
outline: First Aid Kit And Medical Kit
courses.course_description: Specialized training on the use and procedures for all safety, emergency, and survival equipment used in aircraft cabins.

courses.title: Air Cargo Operations Management (ACRG)
outline: GENERAL CARGO HANDLING: The Cargo Industry & Its Stakeholders, Loading and Safety, Cargo Acceptance Limitations, Dangerous Goods: Cargo Requiring special Handling
AIRLINE CARGO HANDLING MANAGEMENT: Industry Structure and Common Challenges, Trends in Technology, Cargo Security Procedure, Management of Cargo Security, Dangerous Goods Regulations
courses.course_description: This course covers the management of air cargo operations, including handling, security, dangerous goods, and industry best practices.

courses.title: Carriage of Dangerous Goods Regulations (CDRG)
outline: Shipper’s Declaration and other relevant documentation
courses.course_description: In-depth training on IATA and regulatory requirements for the safe carriage of dangerous goods by air.

courses.title: Basic Aircraft Maintenance Technicians Course (BATCO)
courses.course_description: Foundational technical training for aspiring aircraft maintenance technicians covering mathematics, physics, aerodynamics, systems, and regulations.

courses.title: Company Procedures Indoctrination Training for Airline’s Personnel
outline: The Aviation Regulatory Environment: ICAO SARPS, Civil Aviation Act, Nigeria Civil Aviation Regulations (Nig.CARs)
Key Areas of Corporate Organisation and Management
Key Issues from Company Manuals: Operations Manual, Maintenance Control Manual, SMS and Quality Manuals, Maintenance Programme, MEL & Ground Operations Manual
courses.course_description: Indoctrination program familiarizing airline personnel with company procedures, regulatory environment, SMS, and key operational manuals.

courses.title: Minimum Equipment List Course (MEL)
courses.course_description: Practical training on the development, use, and management of Minimum Equipment Lists for aircraft dispatch.

courses.title: Ramp Services Course (RSC)
outline: Aircraft Departures Handling, Post departures activities
Introduction to Marshalling and Apron Marking
courses.course_description: Training on safe and efficient ramp operations, aircraft handling, safety, and ground support procedures.

courses.title: Passenger Services Course Basic (PSCB)
outline: Airline Geography, Time-Tables, Schedules, City Codes.
Handling of Special Category Passenger viz UM, STCR, WCHR
Introduction to Passenger Ticketing and Baggage check
courses.course_description: Basic training for passenger services staff covering check-in, boarding, special passengers, and customer service procedures.

courses.title: Customer Service Orientation Course (CSO)
outline: Achieving Corporate Objectives through Quality Service
Introduction to Behaviour Analysis and Transaction Analysis
Total Quality Concept and Application (Customer Service)
Passenger Requiring Special Attention Effective Communications.
Handling Upset Customer (delays, disruptions, diversions, cancellation etc)
Techniques of Effective Communication and Customer Contact
Product Knowledge and Route Geography of the Airline
Airline Goals and Corporate Culture and Mission etc.
courses.course_description: Focuses on developing excellent customer service skills, handling difficult situations, and maintaining a customer-centric approach in aviation.

courses.title: Introduction to Aircraft Maintenance Management for the Financial Sector
outline: Aircraft Maintenance Management Practices and Procedures
Securing the Lessor in Engine and Component Leasing
The Lease Monitoring Inspection of Aircraft
Selection Criteria for a Maintenance Facility
Managing the Airline Engineering and Maintenance Function
courses.course_description: Tailored for financial sector professionals, this course explains aircraft maintenance concepts, leasing, valuation, and risk management relevant to aviation financing.

courses.title: Helicopter Landing Officers Course (HLO)
outline: Familiarity with the Helideck/Helipad and Associated Equipment
Duties and Responsibility of Helicopter Landing Officer (HLO)
Role of the HLO and Helideck Team
Offshore Helicopter Operations and General Safety
Procedure To Be Followed In Helicopter Operations
Communication procedures (Hand signal and Radio Communications)
Human Factors and DRM in Helicopter Operations and SMS
Awareness of The Potential Dangers Associated With Helicopter Operations.
courses.course_description: Specialized training for Helicopter Landing Officers covering helideck operations, safety, emergency procedures, and coordination with pilots.

courses.title: Aircraft Maintenance Licence Preparatory Course (AMLPC) (A&P)
outline: Hydraulic and Pneumatic Systems (Pressurisation and Airconditioning Systems)
Fire Warning Protection and Control System
courses.course_description: Extensive preparatory course for Aircraft Maintenance Licence (Airframe & Powerplant) covering all required EASA/NCAA modules.

courses.title: Aircraft Maintenance Licence Preparatory Course (AMLPC) (Avionics)
outline: Basic Aerodynamics and weight and Balance
Hydraulic and Pneumatic Systems (Pressurisation and Airconditioning Systems)
Fire Warning Protection and Control System
Fundamentals of Computer Systems and Microprocessor
courses.course_description: Comprehensive preparatory training for Avionics stream of Aircraft Maintenance Licence, focusing on electrical, electronic, and instrument systems.

courses.title: B737-200 Type Training (Maintenance: Initial) Course
courses.course_description: Aircraft type-specific maintenance training (initial and refresher) for the Boeing 737-200. This variant is for the initial maintenance track.

courses.title: B737-200 Type Training (Maintenance: Refresher) Course
courses.course_description: Aircraft type-specific maintenance training (initial and refresher) for the Boeing 737-200. This variant is for the refresher maintenance track.

courses.title: B737 Classic (300/400/500) Type Training (Maintenance: Initial) Course
courses.course_description: Detailed type training for Boeing 737 Classic series aircraft maintenance. This variant is for the initial maintenance track.

courses.title: B737 Classic (300/400/500) Type Training (Maintenance: Refresher) Course
courses.course_description: Detailed type training for Boeing 737 Classic series aircraft maintenance. This variant is for the refresher maintenance track.

courses.title: B737NG Type Training (Maintenance: Initial) Course
courses.course_description: Boeing 737 Next Generation (NG) aircraft maintenance type training. This variant is for the initial maintenance track.

courses.title: B737NG Type Training (Maintenance: Refresher) Course
courses.course_description: Boeing 737 Next Generation (NG) aircraft maintenance type training. This variant is for the refresher maintenance track.

courses.title: B737 Classic/NG Differences Course
courses.course_description: Differences training between B737 Classic and NG variants covering all relevant ATA chapters.

courses.title: Bombardier CRJ-700/705/900/1000 Type Training (Maintenance: Initial) Course
outline: Electronic Emergency And Cabin Entertainment Equipment
courses.course_description: Type rating maintenance training for Bombardier CRJ family aircraft. This variant is for the initial maintenance track.

courses.title: Bombardier CRJ-700/705/900/1000 Type Training (Maintenance: Refresher) Course
outline: Electronic Emergency And Cabin Entertainment Equipment
courses.course_description: Type rating maintenance training for Bombardier CRJ family aircraft. This variant is for the refresher maintenance track.

courses.title: DHC 8 (Q-400) Type Training (Maintenance: Initial) Course
outline: Electronic Emergency And Cabin Entertainment Equipment
courses.course_description: Maintenance type training for the Bombardier DHC-8 Q400 turboprop aircraft. This variant is for the initial maintenance track.

courses.title: DHC 8 (Q-400) Type Training (Maintenance: Refresher) Course
outline: Electronic Emergency And Cabin Entertainment Equipment
courses.course_description: Maintenance type training for the Bombardier DHC-8 Q400 turboprop aircraft. This variant is for the refresher maintenance track.

courses.title: ERJ-135,145/Legacy 600/650 Type Training (Maintenance: Initial) Course
outline: Electronic Emergency And Cabin Entertainment Equipment
courses.course_description: Embraer ERJ and Legacy series aircraft maintenance type training. This variant is for the initial maintenance track.

courses.title: ERJ-135,145/Legacy 600/650 Type Training (Maintenance: Refresher) Course
outline: Electronic Emergency And Cabin Entertainment Equipment
courses.course_description: Embraer ERJ and Legacy series aircraft maintenance type training. This variant is for the refresher maintenance track.
